TopModule.BindInstances: A_tile_U A_tile_1_U A_tile_2_U A_tile_3_U B_tile_U B_tile_1_U B_tile_2_U B_tile_3_U C_local_U C_local_1_U C_local_2_U C_local_3_U icmp_ln36_fu_292_p2 add_ln36_1_fu_298_p2 add_ln36_fu_312_p2 control_s_axi_U gmem_a_m_axi_U gmem_b_m_axi_U gmem_c_m_axi_U

field.name: Enable
field.description: Master enable for the device interrupt output to the system interrupt controller: 0 = Disabled, 1 = Enabled

field.name: CHAN0_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 0 (ap_done) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 0 interrupt, 1 = Channel 0 interrupt.

field.name: CHAN1_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 1 (ap_ready) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 1 interrupt, 1 = Channel 1 interrupt.

table.keys: Interface, Read/Write, Data Width (SW->HW), Address Width, Latency, Offset, Register, Max Widen Bitwidth, Max Read Burst Length, Max Write Burst Length, Num Read Outstanding, Num Write Outstanding
Interface, Data Width, Address Width, Offset, Register
Interface, Register, Offset, Width, Access, Description, Bit Fields
table.column: CTRL, 0x00, 32, RW, Control signals, 0=AP_START 1=AP_DONE 2=AP_IDLE 3=AP_READY 7=AUTO_RESTART 9=INTERRUPT
GIER, 0x04, 32, RW, Global Interrupt Enable Register, 0=Enable
IP_IER, 0x08, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Enable Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_EN 1=CHAN1_INT_EN
IP_ISR, 0x0c, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Status Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_ST 1=CHAN1_INT_ST
a_1, 0x10, 32, W, Data signal of a,
a_2, 0x14, 32, W, Data signal of a,
b_1, 0x1c, 32, W, Data signal of b,
b_2, 0x20, 32, W, Data signal of b,
c_1, 0x28, 32, W, Data signal of c,
c_2, 0x2c, 32, W, Data signal of c,
clock, ap_clk
reset, ap_rst_n
interrupt, interrupt
ap_ctrl_hs,
in, int const *
in, int const *
out, int*

table.keys: Argument, HW Interface, HW Type, HW Usage, HW Info

section.name: M_AXI Burst Information
section.HEADER_NOTE: Note: All burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

table.keys: HW Interface, Direction, Length, Width, Loop, Loop Location
table.column: read, 16, 512, k_tile_loop, matrix_mul.cpp:36:3

table.keys: HW Interface, Variable, Access Location, Direction, Burst Status, Length, Loop, Loop Location, Resolution, Problem
table.column: a, matrix_mul.cpp:43:22, read, Widened, 1, load_a_tile_lane_loop, matrix_mul.cpp:41:7, ,
a, matrix_mul.cpp:43:22, read, Fail, , load_a_tile_row_loop, matrix_mul.cpp:39:5, 214-230, Stride is incompatible
a, matrix_mul.cpp:43:22, read, Inferred, 4, load_a_tile_lane_loop, matrix_mul.cpp:41:7, ,

b, matrix_mul.cpp:36:3, read, Widen Fail, , load_b_tile_lane_loop, matrix_mul.cpp:48:5, 214-353, Could not widen since type i512 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 512
b, matrix_mul.cpp:52:22, read, Widened, 16, load_b_tile_col_loop, matrix_mul.cpp:50:7, ,
b, matrix_mul.cpp:52:22, read, Inferred, 256, k_tile_loop, matrix_mul.cpp:36:3, ,
c, matrix_mul.cpp:79:11, write, Widened, 16, store_c_loop, matrix_mul.cpp:77:3, ,
c, matrix_mul.cpp:79:11, write, Inferred, 256, store_c_loop, matrix_mul.cpp:77:3, ,

Pragma.options: m_axi port=a offset=slave bundle=gmem_a depth=MATRIX_SIZE max_read_burst_length=1 max_widen_bitwidth=512
m_axi port=b offset=slave bundle=gmem_b depth=MATRIX_SIZE max_read_burst_length=1 max_widen_bitwidth=512
m_axi port=c offset=slave bundle=gmem_c depth=MATRIX_SIZE max_write_burst_length=1 max_widen_bitwidth=512
